violations.text: An employee was observed touching ready to eat grilled cheese sandwiches with bare hands. Foods were reheated during time of inspection. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

Sneeze guard was observed missing at pizza station. Food on display shall be protected from contamination by the use of packaging, food guards, display cases or other effective means. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. the service counter by storage room (laminate covering observed peeling or worn down) 2. storage shelving in the dry storage room 3. gaskets for 2 door reach-in near warewashing area Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2025
Walk-in freezer was in poor repair. Unit was out of service during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/12/2026
The kitchen hood vents were observed with an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/12/2026
Several ceiling tiles in storage room were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2026

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. the service counter by storage room (laminate covering observed peeling or worn down) 2. storage shelving in the dry storage room 3. gaskets for walk-in freezer 4. gaskets for 2 door reach-in near warewashing area Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2025
Tray drop-off area was observed unfinished (covered in plastic tarp). Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2025

Raw liquid eggs were observed stored above lettuce in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. the service counter by storage room (laminate covering observed peeling or worn down) 2. storage shelving in the dry storage room 3. gaskets for walk-in freezer 4. gaskets for 2 door reach-in near warewashing area New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the warewashing room and the front door entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024

1. The service counter by storage room was observed in poor repair. Laminate covering observed peeling or worn down. 2. Storage shelving in the dry storage room observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
The facility is lacking a food prep sink. Food prep sink must be properly air gapped. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

The dumpster outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

A Hand sink is needed it at the 2nd service area. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the AC ventilation system above milk units, 2 door reach-in refrigerator unit, dishwasher area have an accumulation of dust, dirt. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

The wall in the dishwasher area and floor under the Aquafina refrigerator has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024
The ceiling tiles about preparation table are in poor repair missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

A Hand sink is needed in the 2nd service area. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023

A Hand sink is needed in the 2nd service area. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by mice droppings at the storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023

The door to the outside, located in the dining area and receiving door, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2023

Mice droppings were observed on the floor and shelves in the dry storage area. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023

A Hand sink is needed in the 2nd service area. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by mice droppings in the storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. By person in charge pest control company increase the visits. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023
Mice droppings were observed on the floor and shelves in the dry storage area. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023

A Hand sink is need it at the 2nd service area. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by mice droppings a the storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. By person in charge pest control company is active 1Xmonth. New assessment is request by Food inspector by next re-inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023
The establishment has an FMC not registered with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back dining area is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2023
